name: redact-log
author: Christian Paul (https://github.com/cpauldev)
description: RedactLog is a TypeScript logging and redaction toolkit for safely handling secrets, tokens, credentials, and provider identifiers before they reach logs.

scripts.test:smoke: bun -e "const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); for (const key of ['redactString','redactValue','createRedactor','createLogger','createConsoleBridge']) { if (typeof mod[key] !== 'function') throw new Error('Missing export: ' + key); }"
